##DESCRIPTION=Black rounded octahedra associated with phlogopite and diopside

##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.4003 b: 8.4003 c: 8.4003 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 592.78 crystal system: cubic
